description.text: splitting bug 1448213 into two as Brian suggests

ranked_scenarios.summary: Migrate the "Privacy" section of Preferences to the new Localization API

description.text:
This bug will cover the migration work required to move the "Sync" section of Preferences to Fluent.

URL: http://searchfox.org/mozilla-central/source/browser/components/preferences/in-content/privacy.xul

The old preferences fork should be removed once we are satisfied with the state of the preferences reorg. This should remove the /browser/components/preferences/in-content-old/ directory, and also undo the changes in allowed-dupes.mn.
